hypothesis: Frozen ExECT S4 K0+K1 cause-bridge field-family pass on the full fixed validation split (40 records) with Gemini 3 Flash establishes hosted-model comparison evidence against GPT, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, and Qwen S4 anchors under model_suite_frozen_architecture_v1.
metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S4 diagnostics (eleven families), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across eleven families is not comparable to frozen S3 nine-family or S2 five-family headlines.
Operational program_variant exect_s4_field_family_cause_bridge_k0_k1_single_pass matches frozen GPT S4 default.
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment; same scorer, different model track.
Report per-family F1 and monitor frozen S3 families for regression vs S3 v1.2 full anchor (…235439Z).
Record token usage, latency, and billing when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
